title: The Giant Elephant Appears
description: On pages 15–15, this part focuses on the giant elephant appears within the Weevil, the Barto Club, and the Road to Zou storyline.
scene: The Straw Hats rely on Bartolomeo's chaotic crew while the wider world introduces Weevil and pushes the voyage toward Zou.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: So this is [Zou]!! I must say, the sheer number of peculiar and diverse things in foreign waters is truly a sight to behold....!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Oi! I've heard of tales about a tribe living on [Zou] that has utter disdain for humans or anything resembling...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been told this country has gone nearly 1000 years without any humans ever having come into contact with it.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: As they get ready to embark onto Zou, what new adventure awaits them on the back of this giant behemoth?!

summary: The Giant Elephant Appears: The Straw Hats struggle aboard Bartolomeo's ship while Edward Weevil and Miss Bakkin enter the story, and the crew follows the Vivre Card toward Zou.
